title: MYC CHAIRMAN-IN RAWPUICHHIP YMA DAY LAWMNA HMANPUI
content:
1006/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026 :Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte, Chairman, Mizoram Youth Commission (MYC) chuan vawiin khan Rawpuichhip YMA Day lawmna Khuallian niin a hmanpui. Rawpuichhip YMA hian kumin YMA day lawmna thupuiah "Ruihhlo Do" tih an hmang a ni.

Khuallian MYC Chairman Pu Malsawmzuala Ralte chuan Sawrkarin ruihhlo do kawngah theihtawp a chhuah thu sawiin, Excise & Narcotics, Police, CID leh SIB te tha taka thawk hovin ruihhlo tihrem kawngah tha an thawh nasa hle a ni, a ti a. Ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih do kawnga YMA hmalakna fakawm tiin, theihtawp chhuaha Sawrkar tawiawm zel turin a sawm a. Ruihhloin a tihbuai thalaite enkawlna Hulhliap Short Stay Centre, Synod Camping Centre camping chhawng 9 buatsaih a ni tawh tih sawiin, camper 2200 vel an enkawl atanga zaa 30 vel zetin ruihhlo an la nghei chhunzawm zel thu a sawi a. Ruihhlo la ti ve lo naupang leh thalaite venhim a tul thu sawiin, inchhungkhur, sunday school leh school-ahte tichhin lova fihlim tura inzirtir a tul thu a sawi bawk.

Inkhawm hi Pu H. Vanlalzapa, Branch YMA President-in a kaihruai a, Pu HB Lalfakawma, VCP-in thu a sawi bawk.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA CHUAN KEIFANG LONEITUTE HNENAH COCOA TIAK A SEM
content:
1005/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026:Rural Development Minister leh Tawi bialtu MLA ni bawk Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a bial chhunga Keifang loneitute hnenah vawiin khan Keifang VC Hall-ah Cocoa ṭiak a sem.

Keifangah hian Cocoa chingtu chhungkaw 16 an awm mek a, a ṭiakte hi Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan a MLA fund aṭanga a leisak a ni.

Thu sawiin Prof. Lalnilawma chuan sawrkar chuan mitin 'Fairel bel thleng phak' nih tumin theihtawp a chhuah thu a sawi a, 'a sawi chauh ni lo, a tiha tih' a tum zel avangin a sawi tawh chu bawhzui zel a tum thu a sawi. Cocoa tiak an phunte chu a lo puitlin huna mimal tin ten mahni in chhungkhur aṭanga ei zawnna ṭha tak an neih phah ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Minister chuan kuthnathawka ei zawngte hian dinhmun tha zawk a an din theih nan Sawrkar in theihtawp a chhuah thu sawiin, hmalakna hrang hrang te hi a hlawhtlin theih nan chuan beneficiaries/ partner (kan thawhpui te) an pawimawh thu a sawi a. Heng hmalaknate hi a hlawhtlinna hmuh ngei theih nan kan vaiin thawhhona tha tak hnuaiah, taima tak leh rinawm takin kan thawhho zel a pawimawh a ni, a ti.

Vawiina Cocoa tiak semna hun hi Zo-Troy Agri-Horti Farmer Producer Company Limited leh Kangmual Farmers Association tangkawpa buatsaih a ni a. Keifang chu cocoa chinna atan hmun tha a ni thei dawn em tia enchhinna pilot project a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT HOSPITAL-AH KHUM 15 AWM THEIHNA TUR MAKESHIFT BUILDING THAR HAWN A NI
content:
1004/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 15thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Hospital-a khum 15 awm theihna tur Makeshift Building thar chu hawn a ni. A hawnna inkhawm hi Chief Medical Officer Conference Hall, Serchhip-ah buatsaih niin, Lok Sabaha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha’n khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Serchhip District Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma chu khualzahawm niin, Joint VC Chairman Pu R. Sanghmingthanga'n hun a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan fund pek chhuah kawngah, ram tana ro tling thilte a ngaih pawimawh thu sawiin, Makeshift Bulding sak nana hmalakna chu thil ngaihhlutawm tak a nih thu a sawi a. Kalphung thar Sawrkarin Department hrang hrangah theihtawp chhuahin tan an lak thu sawiin, 'Health Deparment chu Deparment thang nasa pawl tak an ni' a ti a. Mizoramin Health Minister tha tak kan nei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, MUHCS pawhin ram pawn thlenga ngaihhlut a hlawh thu leh Serchhip District-ah pawh beneficiary 715 vel an awm tawh thu a sawi bawk. Serchhip District chu district hmasawn leh danglam bik nia a hriat thu sawiin DISHA Meeting-a District hrang hrang a tlawh kualnaah pawh 'Serchhip District chu District tam takin Central Scheme implement kawngah pawh an pha lo che u a ni,' a ti a. Kum 1978-a MLA hmeichhia thlang tling thei District, hmeichhe dinhmun chawi sanna kawnga hmahruaitu an nih thu pawh sawiin hma sawn zel turin duhsakna a hlan bawk a ni.

Khualzahawm Serchhip DC Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Damdawi In khum indaih lohna hian mipuite nunah leh ni tin khawsakna kawngah nasa takin nghawng a neih thu a sawi a.  Sawrkar hruaitu Chief Minister leh Lok Sabha MP ten Serchhip mipuite harsatna hrethiama, Makeshift Bulding sak hlawhtlin a nih theih nana an hmalaknaah lawmthu sawiin, Serchhip Joint VC-ten fund awm sa ni miah lo ata, awma siama mipui tana an pen chhuahna chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi bawk a. Health Department-a thawkte hnenah pawh lawmthu sawiin, mipuite'n an chhawr nghal theih tura hma la zui (activate) nghal turin a ngen nghal bawk a. Kalkhawmte chu mi dangte tana malsawmna ni tura fuihin, peih chin baka ke pen luih hram hramna hian hmasawnna nasa zawk a thlen thin tih hre renga, theihtawp chhuah zel turin a chah bawk.

District Medical Superintendent Dr. ZD Lalmuanawma pawhin thu sawiin Joint VC Secretary Lalrinmawia Khiangte hnen atangin ngaihthlak a ni a. Tarlan a nih danin building zau zawng (area) hi 28ft x 33ft a ni a, floor tile phah niin 1st floor-ah toilet European 2 leh Indian 3 dah niin 2nd floor-ah European 1 leh Indian 3 dah a ni bawk.

Chief Minister hmalakna kaltlangin NEDFi CSR atangin cheng nuai 17.3 leh MP Fund atangin cheng nuai 20 hmuh a ni a; he building sak hna thawktu Joint VC te hian sum hman bang awm ang angte chu CM Relief Fund-ah an chhunluh leh vek tur thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Governor Conveys Greetings to YMA on Its 91st Foundation Day
content:
174/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), has extended warm greetings to the Young Mizo Association (YMA) and all its members on the 91st Foundation Day.

Describing YMA as the largest socio-cultural and voluntary organisation in Mizoram, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh said that since its inception, the organisation has been at the forefront of community service. He commended YMA for its consistent efforts in helping the needy, preserving and promoting Mizo culture, tradition and heritage, and for providing valuable support to the Government in successfully implementing various initiatives with wide outreach.

On this occasion, the Governor called upon the people of Mizoram to uphold the cherished Mizo value of Tlawmngaihna - the spirit of selflessness, compassion and voluntary service - in all their actions. He also appealed to the people to promote unity among different sections of society, respect our elders, remain rooted in our rich cultural heritage, stay away from drugs and substance abuse, and strengthen the collective fight against this menace, particularly to secure a bright future for the youth.

The Governor expressed confidence that YMA will continue to work in close cooperation with the Government and various sections of society for the progress and welfare of the people of Mizoram and the nation.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap-in YMA Day vawi 91-na pualin duhsakna hlan
content:
1003/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 15th June, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan Young Mizo Association (YMA) dinchamphaphak vawi 91-na pualin YMA leh pawl member zawng zawngte duhsakna a hlan.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan YMA chu khawtlang, hnam ziarang leh nunphung chawilar leh tihhmasawn kawnga Mizorama tlawmngai pawl lian ber a nih thu sawiin, din a nih atanga vawiin ni thlengin midangte rawngbawl sak kawngah a khaipa ber a ni, a ti. Tanpui ngaite tanpui, Mizo hnam ziarang, nunphung leh rohlu chhawmnun leh chawilar kawngah YMA-in theihtawp a chhuah leh Sawrkar hmalaknate a hlawhtlin theih nan leh zau zawk a thlen theih nana tha taka a tawiawm thin chu fakawm tiin, chhawmnung zel turin a chah a ni.

Larsap chuan YMA Day pualin Mizo mipuite chu an thil tihna apiangah Tlawmngaihna lantir thin tura chahin, mahni inphata, lainatna leh midang tana inpekna nunpui tlat turin a sawm a. Hnam bil hrang hrang inkara inunauna chawilar turte, aia upa zah tur leh mahni hnam tobul nghet taka vuan turte, ruihhlo leh a kaihhnawih laka inthiar fihlim tur leh thalaite hmakhua ngaia theihtawp chhuaha tangruala do let turin a chah a ni.

Larsap chuan Mizoram mipui leh ram pum hamthat nan YMA chuan Sawrkar leh khawtlang huap pawl dangte nen tha taka hma an lak ho zel a beisei thu sawiin, YMA kalzelna turah duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Attachment
